tasks.implementation_notes:

(Commercial Paper and Non-Convertible Debentures of original or initial
maturity upto one year) Directions, 2024.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Be Direction - Reserve Bank
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (commercial paper and non-convertible debentures of original or initial maturity upto one year). Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be Direction - Reserve Bank
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be Direction - Reserve Bank'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be Direction - Reserve Bank
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be Direction - Reserve Bank' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be Direction - Reserve Bank

Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.

tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning as assigned in section 2 (e) of the depositories act, 1996 (22 of 1996). Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.

tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Have assigned in Section 2
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Have assigned in Section 2'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Have assigned in Section 2
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Have assigned in Section 2' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Have assigned in Section 2

tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
